title: Apparatus for machining ceramic articles
abstract: Apparatus (19) that is particularly suited for machining hard dense ceramic materials comprises a vertical milling machine (20) within an enclosure (54). The machine has a plurality of slides for moving a spindle holding an end mill in the x, y, and z directions. The x and y slides (24, 26) are located above the elevation of the work table (22) and any workpiece held thereon. Air flows downwardly from the region of the x and y slides and through gaps associated with two fabric shields (80, 82) which have horizontal portions that translate respectively in the x axis and y axis directions. The shields inhibit coolant that contains work piece particulates from traveling upwardly toward the x and y slides. A tool changer system comprises a tool holding tray (30) mounted adjacent the work table (22) within a housing (64) having a movable cover (42). The housing enables the tool tray to be removed from the enclosure through an access door (46) while the machine tool is operating and coolant is flowing.
